titulo: 🌟 ¡El top goleador del Mundial 2026 está aquí!
subtitulo: Descubre quién lidera la tabla de goleadores en un mundial épico

items.descripcion: Youngest to reach 10 in a World Cup, record-breaking performance.
Scored first goal at 17, fastest debut scorer in modern era.
Only England player with >5 goals in a World Cup, veteran striker.
Midfielder netting 6, first Portuguese midfielder to do so in a World Cup.
Brazil's prolific forward, first to score 5 without playing in the same year.
Only African to score 5+ in a single World Cup, unforgettable strike.
Veteran striker, netting 4 with a stunning header, history in the books.
Spanish winger, fastest goal record for Spain, added pace to attack.

dato_extra: ¡No te pierdas el gol con el que Haaland anotó su décimo, en el minuto 92!
